titleStmt.title: SII 40.288: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 288. (A.R. No. B. 333 of 1933.) Śiripuram, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a Nandi-pillar set up in the Rāmaliṅgēśvara temple.

Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Mūlasthāna-Rāmēśvara-Mahādēva of Siripuraṁ by Sūrapōtu and his brothers Nārāyaṇa and Nāgadēva for the merit of their parents Kāṭya-Veṇgaḍla and Anyasāni. They are stated to have descended from Rēmana, who was born at the village Chirusēṇdru in Pallapu Gudravāra-vishaya and who belonged to the Yājñyavalkya-Śākhā and the Kauśika-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti stutyayaśāstrilōkanayanōmū
[¨r]ttistriṇētrasyayastrēṣvādhyāya tanustri
lōkamahitastrailōkyadīpassutāṁbha¨rttā
tasya vikattanassyataraṇēstrailōkyarakṣāma
ṇēḥ śiṣyādhita yaju¨rggaṇōdivitatōyō yā
jñyavalkyōmuniḥ . Ācā¨ryyatvamupētya ni
tyavijayīvādē catu¨rvvēdagaḥ khyātaṁ yō
gavidāṁvarovvyaracamatsaddhammaśāstraṁ
sudhīḥ . śākhāyāmmuni vallabhassya baha
vaḥ prājñābudhājagnirēyōgīṁdrassyavasu
ṁddharāyaravastatrānvayō yōjana . śrīmā
nbhāsurakauśikānvayapayō vārāśirājōda
yaḥ svāmipallapuguddravāraviṣayē
ciṟusēṁḍrunāmnestutē grāmē rēmana nā
madhēyadharaṇīdēvōttamassadguṇipatitassya
satīlikhāmaṇirabhūprōlāṁbbhīkāsuvvratā
tatputtrō bhuvanattrayaikacēdita śrīkāṭa
nā¨ryyaḥ kritidātādha¨rmmaparassuni¨rmmalama
tissējanyalakṣmīpatiḥ . Annāṁbbādhikabāṁbṛ jā
tanayanātasyābhavadkhyāyeni . pātivvratyagu
ṇānvitājananutāsaiṁdda¨ryyadhai¨ryyānvitā . tā
bhyāṁ putravarāstrayassayabhavadvīśvēśanētrōpa
maḥ . ssū¨ryyassūyyāmarapramassudhritimā
nārāyaṇasyadguṇaḥ nāgāstyāgaguṇō¨rjjitākka
tanaya śrī yājñavalkyānvaya sadbhaktau śaśiśēkharaṁ
ghriyugaḷē yēbhāṁtti dhātrītatalē . dēṣṭaśrēṣṭaguṇau

jvālā vidagdhasmariṁhṛtpadmasthaḍu ku¨rvvatē prati
dinaṁtyaktānyacittāścayē . sēvyābhavyaguṇāssa
mā¨rjjitaṣṭuṇāmattyēstriva¨rggā yadhāgaṁggāya
viditāstrayaśśubhakarāmā¨rggā yathāmē trayī
puṇyābhūsutavatavaddhanakarānarīṁdadhānā
yadābhāntiṣyanti samanvitāśśivamatiṁyēbhā
ṁtti śōryōnatiṁ . dāttryāṁ dha¨rmmaja bhīmapā¨rtthasa
driśāssatyē batē vikramē . saubhrātrēvilasadguṇēva
ramatē viśvēśvarābhya¨rccanē . kāṁtyāṁ sa¨rvvakalāka
lāpanipuṇēyē bhānti santō guṇairannāṁbbā
tanayāssamā¨rjjitanayāḥ sakhyāta saukhyō
dayāḥ . saubhrātrātipatitra sadguṇadayāstō
traikapātraṁ raṇījātaṁ śatrubhiratragōtratilakaṁ
dhātryāṁ suputratrayaṁ śrīvēdatrayavajja
gatrayamiva śrī kōṭanākhyasyayatē . bhātya
gnitrayavadguṇatritayavadrāmatrayaṁ vā
bhuvē . śakābdē gatinaṁddakhēṁdu gaṇitē yāmyā
yanētētvimē śrīmatpa¨rvva paścimākhyadiṣa
yē bhaktyā pradīpammudāgrāmē śrīpuranā
madhēya viditē rāmēśvarāmādarādācaṁdrā
¨rkkamakhaṁḍḍamaṁḍitadaśaṁ viśvēśvarāya diśana
śrī śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1094 gunēṁṭi dakṣiṇā
yana saṁkrāṁti nimittamuna siripuramu
śrī mūlasthānamu rāmēśvaramahādēvaraku sū
rapōtunu nārāyanaṁḍunu nāgadēvaṁḍunu ta
mataṁḍri gāṭyaveṁggaḍlaku damatalli A
nyasāniki dha¨rmmāttamugā nakhaṁḍadīpamu
ku niccina goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjēkoni mrā
nyabāyuni koḍku Amarabāyuṁḍu tana
putrānupautrikaṁbugā nityamānē
ṁḍu nēyi pōyaṁggalavāru .
Digital edition of SII 40.288 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
